prompt: Fitness instructional image, full body, one person performing a correct dead bug exercise on a mat. The person is lying flat on their back, face up, not side plank, not bridge, not crunch. Both hips and knees start bent at 90 degrees in tabletop position. One arm is extended straight overhead behind the head while the opposite leg is extended forward and low, hovering above the floor. The other arm remains vertical above the shoulder and the other knee stays bent above the hip. Core braced, lower back gently pressed toward the floor, neutral neck, clear instructional posture. Camera angle slightly elevated side view so the supine position is obvious. Clean gym or studio background, realistic but didactic style for a training app, sharp anatomy and pose, no text, no logos, no watermark.
